# OAuth2Options.ResolveEndpointsFromMetadata property

Gets or sets a value indicating whether missing OAuth2 endpoints should be resolved from [`OAuth2MetadataUrl`](./OAuth2MetadataUrl).

public bool ResolveEndpointsFromMetadata { get; set; }
